description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This document defines the steps for an operator to deposit assets from the ALM Proxy to the ERC-4626 vault to receive yield-bearing shares.
◦ The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator, acting as `RELAYER`, initiates a deposit.

◦ Pre-conditions are checked: Grove Liquidity Layer contract `isActive`, ALM Proxy has sufficient underlying asset, and the deposit amount is within instance-specific `RateLimits` (defined in the relevant Instance Configuration Document).
◦ The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator approves the target ERC4626 vault (identified by its `token` address in the Instance Configuration Document) to spend the underlying `asset` from the ALM Proxy.

◦ The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator calls the `deposit(uint256 amount, address receiver)` function on the target ERC4626 vault, specifying the `amount` of underlying asset and the ALM `proxy` as the receiver of vault shares.
◦ The number of shares received is recorded.

◦ For detailed call structures, instance-specific parameters (vault address, asset address, rate limits), and operational examples, refer to the specific ERC4626 Instance Configuration Document (ICD).
description: Extra spaces have been removed. --- The following have been kept unchanged: - Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces - Interlinear spaces - Table layouts excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces Newlines have not been changed.

diff: This document defines the steps for an operator to deposit assets from the ALM Proxy to the ERC-4626 vault to receive yield-bearing shares.
◦ The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator, acting as `RELAYER`, initiates a deposit.

◦ Pre-conditions are checked: Grove Liquidity Layer contract `isActive`, ALM Proxy has sufficient underlying asset, and the deposit amount is within instance-specific `RateLimits` (defined in the relevant Instance Configuration Document).
◦ The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator approves the target ERC4626 vault (identified by its `token` address in the Instance Configuration Document) to spend the underlying `asset` from the ALM Proxy.

◦ The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator calls the `deposit(uint256 amount, address receiver)` function on the target ERC4626 vault, specifying the `amount` of underlying asset and the ALM `proxy` as the receiver of vault shares.
◦ The number of shares received is recorded.
refer to the specific ERC4626 Instance

- Pre-conditions are checked: Grove Liquidity Layer contract `isActive`, ALM Proxy has sufficient underlying asset, and the deposit amount is within instance-specific `RateLimits` (defined in the relevant Instance Configuration Document).
- The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator approves the target ERC4626 vault (identified by its `token` address in the Instance Configuration Document) to spend the underlying `asset` from the ALM Proxy.

- The Grove Liquidity Layer Operator calls the `deposit(uint256 amount, address receiver)` function on the target ERC4626 vault, specifying the `amount` of underlying asset and the ALM `proxy` as the receiver of vault shares.
- The number of shares received is recorded.

- For detailed call structures, instance-specific parameters (vault address, asset address, rate limits), and operational examples, refer to the specific ERC4626 Instance Configuration Document (ICD).
description: @blimpa @Coolcatcatio This PR updates all lists within the Atlas to follow the markdown specification. It also adds a markdownlint config file to start the process of fixing formatting across editors.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
